head.title: Why choose us | Moonstone Advocates
head.description: Discover why clients choose us. Our expert Kampala solicitors deliver exceptional service, practical advice and trusted support to help you move forward with confidence.

blocks.html:
Why choose Moonstone

We're not your typical law firm

With us, you’ll meet an expert team, highly motivated to deliver exceptional service. Our aim is to inspire our clients to embrace the future with confidence.

You’ll find people who are charged with positive energy and proactivity. As an independent firm, we’re agile and quick to respond. We empower our team to take the initiative and think creatively.

A diverse team, united by a shared commitment to achieving the best outcome for you. Come and meet our inspirational team.

Meet our people

Get in touch

Home
Why choose us

Our clients trust us with their biggest decisions, from protecting their family interests to growing national businesses. Whatever your goals, we help you achieve more.

Our 33 partners bring deep expertise across our services, so you always have senior input, clear direction, and decisions you can trust.

33

240 people make up our team, each bringing their own perspective and drive to help you get the right result.

240

Our 4.7 out of 5 rating on ReviewSolicitors, based on more than 3,500 reviews, reflects the trust, consistency, and care our clients experience every day.

4.7

Why work with us

Clear advice. Real understanding.

Legal support should feel personal, not transactional. We take the time to understand what you’re trying to achieve and what matters most to you. We speak plainly and explain your options clearly. We guide you through each stage so you always know where you stand and what comes next.

Expertise you can rely on.

From everyday matters to complex challenges, our specialists bring deep experience across business, personal, and sector specific work. You’ll have expert support and practical solutions shaped around your situation. We think commercially, act decisively and tailor our advice to fit you. Never a one size fits all approach.

A proactive team on your side.

We act quickly, think ahead and stay focused on the outcome. Whether you’re navigating change, resolving a dispute or planning for the future, we keep things moving with energy and purpose. You’ll get practical support, clear direction, and results you can feel confident in.

Our team is our greatest strength

Everyone in our team brings their own strengths and experience. What unites us is a shared commitment to delivering exceptional legal support through approachability, professionalism, and authenticity.

Meet our people

Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
Thank you to Danielle for all her effort during this process, obviously not one I wanted to be in, but Danielle has made it a much clearer and less stressful one.
Commercial Dispute Resolution Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
Andrew Pedley was the driving force at Moonstone LLP. He really made us feel like we were the only case on his desk. No job was too small, and no question was too little to ask. He made me feel like my thoughts and views were valid and also explained situations where I wasn't understanding the full picture.
Real Estate Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
Nick helped me through the sale of my family’s Holiday Caravan Park & Residential Park. His knowledge of the industry meant that I was guided through everything and I felt like he was always at the end of the phone when I needed him.
Holiday & Home Parks Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
Georgia was incredibly helpful throughout the process of reaching a settlement with a previous employer. Georgia took the time to understand my personal situation and provided clear, considerate, and professional guidance at every stage. Her support made a complex process much easier to navigate, and I felt reassured knowing I was in capable hands.
Employment Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
I used Moonstone for purchasing my property and again years later whilst re-mortgaging, everyone who I spoke to at Moonstone were incredibly knowledgeable and helpful. Beth Hill & Jack Dodd were fantastic at their roles. I would use Moonstone in the future.
Moonstone Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
Just wanted to say that Danielle's helpfulness, generosity of time, and straightforward way of discussing things so far have already been really refreshing regarding this awkward process. It is really appreciated.
Commercial Dispute Resolution Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
Paula was brilliant throughout, providing help, support and advice during an incredibly long and drawn-out situation that should never have reached that point in the first place. I’m truly grateful for everything she did.
Commercial Dispute Resolution Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
Moonstone provided an excellent, comprehensive service when drawing up my will and Lasting Power Attorney. Emily Owston was professional and answered all of my questions.
Private Wealth & Succession Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
Chris is a great listener, clear communicator and, in my opinion, a genuinely good, kind human being. I have no hesitation in recommending Moonstone in Kampala for any legal matters you may have; you'll be in good hands.
Employment Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
I have dealt with Chris Allen recently concerning some rather upsetting and extremely delicate matters. Chris and the team have proved to be reassuring, down to earth and absolute consummate professionals.
Employment Client

Get clear, confident legal advice today

We’re here to help you take your next step with confidence.

Call us today

Send a general enquiry

Discover how we help businesses

Running a business brings both pressure and opportunity. Our specialists provide clear, commercially focused legal support that helps you handle change, manage risk and make confident decisions at every stage.

Legal support for businesses

Explore how we help individuals

Life can present complicated moments. Your legal advice should not be one of them. Our specialists offer practical guidance that is clear, compassionate and shaped around your situation, helping you make confident decisions at every stage.

Legal support for individuals

Our Service Offerings

1. Corporate & Commercial Advisory

At Moonstone Advocates, we provide practical, commercially focused legal solutions to individuals, businesses, institutions and organisations. Our approach combines legal expertise, industry understanding and client-focused advice to help clients manage risk, protect their interests and achieve their objectives.

We advise businesses at every stage of their growth, from establishment and structuring to expansion and strategic transactions.

Our services include:

  • Company incorporation and business structuring
  • Corporate governance and regulatory compliance
  • Shareholder agreements and corporate documentation
  • Commercial agreements and contract drafting
  • Legal due diligence
  • Business restructuring and reorganisations
  • Mergers, acquisitions and investment transactions
  • Corporate advisory and general business support

2. Tax & Regulatory Advisory

We assist individuals and businesses in managing tax obligations and regulatory compliance.

Our services include:

  • Tax advisory
  • Tax compliance support
  • Regulatory compliance reviews
  • Business licensing and approvals
  • Advisory on statutory obligations
  • Tax dispute support

3. Dispute Resolution

We represent clients in resolving disputes through effective negotiation, mediation, arbitration and court processes.

Our services include:

  • Commercial disputes
  • Civil disputes
  • Debt recovery
  • Contractual disputes
  • Employment disputes
  • Land and property disputes
  • Arbitration and alternative dispute resolution
  • Enforcement of judgments and court orders

4. Real Estate, Land & Property

We provide comprehensive legal support for property owners, investors, developers and businesses.

Our services include:

  • Land transactions
  • Property acquisitions and disposals
  • Conveyancing
  • Lease agreements
  • Real estate due diligence
  • Property development advisory
  • Land dispute resolution
  • Security documentation involving property

5. Employment, Labour & Immigration

We advise employers and employees on workplace relationships and regulatory compliance.

Our services include:

  • Employment contracts
  • Human resource policies and manuals
  • Labour law compliance
  • Disciplinary and termination processes
  • Workplace disputes
  • Employee benefits advisory
  • Immigration and work permit support

6. Family Law

We provide sensitive and practical legal guidance on personal and family-related matters while protecting our clients' interests and privacy.

Our services include:

  • Marriage and matrimonial advisory
  • Divorce and separation matters
  • Child custody and maintenance disputes
  • Family mediation
  • Succession and inheritance planning
  • Wills and estate planning
  • Probate and administration of estates
  • Family property arrangements

7. Banking, Finance & Securities

We provide legal support to financial institutions, lenders, borrowers and businesses in relation to financial transactions and regulatory matters.

Our services include:

  • Loan and facility documentation
  • Security creation and perfection
  • Mortgages, charges and guarantees
  • Banking regulatory advisory
  • Debt recovery and enforcement
  • Financial services agreements
  • Lending and financing transactions
  • Restructuring and insolvency advisory

8. Public Sector & Regulatory Advisory

We advise individuals, businesses and organisations engaging with government institutions and regulated sectors.

Our services include:

  • Regulatory advisory
  • Public procurement support
  • Government contracting
  • Policy and compliance advisory
  • Administrative law matters

9. Energy & Infrastructure

We provide legal support to businesses operating in the energy and infrastructure sectors.

Our services include:

  • Oil and gas law
  • Energy regulatory compliance
  • Infrastructure development and financing
  • Project development agreements
  • Power purchase agreements (PPAs)
  • Environmental and social impact advisory
  • Construction and engineering contracts
  • Public-private partnerships (PPPs)
  • Renewable energy and sustainability advisory

Our Commitment

We deliver solutions that are responsive, commercially practical and aligned with our clients' objectives.

Whether assisting individuals, growing businesses or established institutions, Moonstone Advocates provides trusted legal guidance throughout every stage of the client's journey.

Our commitment to excellence, integrity and client-focused service ensures that we are more than legal advisors—we are strategic partners in our clients' success.

Get in Touch

We're here to listen, advise and deliver practical legal solutions. Reach out to us.

Contact Address
